title: Body Slide (Full Width)
description: Full-width content slide for text, bullet lists, stat cards, tables, or charts

sections.headline: Slide headline — must be a conclusion, not a label. 'Revenue grew 23% YoY' not 'Revenue Overview'.
sections.content: Structured content nodes: bullet lists (max 6 items, max 150 words total), stat cards (2-4 metrics with label + value), tables, bar/line charts, timelines, or comparison grids. One content type per slide — don't mix charts with long bullet lists.

qualityRules: 1 message per slide — if the slide says two things, split it
Headlines must be conclusions ('So what?' test), not topic labels
Max 6 bullet points or 150 words per slide
Stat cards: 2-4 per row, each with label + value + optional trend indicator
Charts use --zen-color-category-N-strong tokens, never hardcoded colors
Tables: max 5 columns, max 6 rows — simplify or split if more data
All text uses Roboto font family
